ogTitle: Wild Dog Valley vs Wilgena: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Wild Dog Valley and Wilgena.
heading: Wild Dog Valley vs Wilgena — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Wild Dog Valley, South Australia and Wilgena, South Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Wild Dog Valley has a lower overall climate risk score (34/100) compared to Wilgena (41/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Wild Dog Valley or Wilgena safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Wild Dog Valley has a flood risk score of 59/100, while Wilgena scores 34/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Wild Dog Valley scores 21/100 for bushfire risk. Wilgena scores 62/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Wild Dog Valley or Wilgena?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Wild Dog Valley has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.58% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
